ink · gesture · found words — st. petersburg, fl

Work
About

My brushstrokes are an ode to the life I notice and the company I keep. I draw the way other people take notes — quickly, to keep something before it leaves: a brush, an ink line, a found word set down beside another word until the two mean something neither carries alone.

The work is field notes from wherever I happen to be sitting — tiny moments strung together like notes to a song, so that when you see it, you can hear it.

Contact smo.jpg@gmail.com
